summary: Iteration 6 testing complete. Verified Upload API (single/multiple file upload, file serving) and Crypto Module API (market prices, buy/sell, stake/unstake, portfolio, transactions). All 74 backend tests passed (24 new + 50 existing). Frontend UI flows working correctly - Crypto page shows 8 coins with prices/APY, buy/sell/stake forms work, all tabs functional.
critical_code_review_comments: Upload API correctly handles single and multiple file uploads with size/type validation
File serving works without authentication (public access to uploaded files)
Crypto market API returns all 8 coins (BTC, ETH, BNB, SOL, USDT, XRP, ADA, DOGE) with prices and APY
Crypto buy/sell correctly integrates with XAF wallet balance
Staking flow works: stake -> earn APY -> unstake with rewards
Crypto transactions history properly tracks all buy/sell/stake operations
Feed page has media upload buttons (image, video) working
Chat page has file attachment button (paperclip) working
Services hub shows both Marketplace and Crypto as 'Actif'
All 5 nav blocks accessible: Accueil, Messenger, Wallet, Services, Profil
seed_data_creation: Created test uploads and crypto transactions during testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 6 verified new features: (1) Upload API - single/multiple file upload with type/size validation, file serving works, (2) Crypto Module - 8 coins with simulated prices, buy/sell with XAF wallet integration, staking with APY rewards, (3) Feed page has media upload buttons, (4) Chat page has file attachment button, (5) Services hub shows Crypto alongside Marketplace as active. Admin has crypto holdings: BTC, DOGE, ADA. Crypto prices are MOCKED (simulated, not from real exchange).

backend_api_tests.existing_tests: 50/50 passed - Auth, Wallet, Messaging, Admin, Users, Feed, Marketplace

frontend_ui_tests: Login with admin@japap.com / JapapAdmin2024! redirects to /feed
Feed page loads with media upload buttons (image, video)
Services hub shows Marketplace and Crypto as 'Actif'
Crypto page shows 8 coins with prices, 24h change, APY badges
Crypto buy form opens and accepts amount input
Crypto Portfolio tab shows holdings with Sell/Stake buttons
Crypto Staking tab shows positions with APY and status
Crypto History tab shows transaction table
Chat page has file attachment button (paperclip)
All 5 nav blocks accessible: Accueil, Messenger, Wallet, Services, Profil

mocked_apis.crypto_market_prices: Simulated prices hardcoded in routes/crypto.py, not from real exchange API
